content: Commander Lilith & the Fight for Sanctuary
name: Retainer
description: An Effervescent Hyperion shield with a narrow but useful movement bonus when paired with Toothpick in the right location. Outside of that setup, it mainly stands out as an unusual Hyperion maylay shield.
notes: It is the only Hyperion-made maylay shield in the game.

special.description: When used with Toothpick in the Writhing Deep, it increases movement speed and jump height. Due to a bug, its melee damage bonus does not apply, so it offers no real roid-style boost.
special.title: Retains your guts inside your body, where they belong.

abilities: When in Writhing Deep with the Toothpick in
